name: apple-mail-pz-mcp
description: MCP server for Apple Mail — search, read, threads, templates, and inbox stats, with an IMAP fast path and a security-first design. Read-only by default.
long_description:
A local, security-first MCP server for Apple Mail on macOS. Reads mail via AppleScript with an optional IMAP fast path for large mailboxes. 26 tools across search/read, drafts, mailbox & rule CRUD, attachments, templates, and inbox statistics.

This bundle installs the server in --read-only mode, exposing the 12 read tools. The 14 mutating tools (drafts, sends, deletes, mailbox & rule CRUD) confirm each destructive action through MCP elicitation, which not every host implements — on a host without it those tools fail closed and can never succeed. To enable writes, add a second server entry without --read-only in a host that supports elicitation (e.g. Claude Code). See the README for IMAP setup and the read/write server split.

No telemetry.

Continues apple-mail-fast-mcp by Morgan Jeffries (MIT), from which this project inherits its AppleScript connector, IMAP fast path, and security model.
